"The default message should be the non-logged-in message"
for (const { urlFinal, urlBase, pref, selector } of menuArray) {
about-logins-login-intro-heading-logged-out2 = Looking for your saved logins? Turn on sync or import them.
login-intro-description = If you saved your logins to { -brand-product-name } on a different device, here’s how to get them here:
login-intro-instructions-fxa = Create or sign in to your { -fxaccount-brand-name(capitalization: "sentence") } on the device where your logins are saved.
login-intro-instructions-fxa-settings = Go to Settings > Sync > Turn on syncing… Select the Logins and passwords checkbox.
-login-intro-instructions-fxa-help = Visit { -lockwise-brand-short-name } Support for more help.
-about-logins-intro-import = If your logins are saved in another browser, you can import them into { -lockwise-brand-short-name }
+about-logins-intro-browser-only-import = If your logins are saved in another browser, you can import them into { -brand-product-name }
about-logins-intro-import2 = If your logins are saved outside of { -brand-product-name }, you can import them from another browser or from a file

desc:
Bug 1739390 - Remove Lockwise branding from about:protections. r=pbz,fluent-reviewers,flod

Differential Revision: https://phabricator.services.mozilla.com/D131863

lines.l: * Displays strings indicating stored logins for a user.
<!-- Display message for stored logins here. -->
"Check that the correct lockwise card content is displayed for non-logged in users."
}, "Lockwise card for user with no logins is visible.");
-        "Firefox Lockwise securely stores your passwords in your browser"
+      "lockwiseHeaderContent contents should match l10n-id attribute set on the element"
}, "Lockwise card for user with logins is visible");
"Waiting for Fluent to provide the title translation"
-        "Securely store and sync your passwords to all your devices"
+      "lockwiseHeaderContent contents should match l10n-id attribute set on the element"
mobile-app-title = Block ad trackers across more devices
mobile-app-card-content = Use the mobile browser with built-in protection against ad tracking.
lockwise-title = Never forget a password again
-lockwise-header-content = { -lockwise-brand-name } securely stores your passwords in your browser.
+passwords-header-content = { -brand-product-name } securely stores your passwords in your browser.
lockwise-header-content-logged-in = Securely store and sync your passwords to all your devices.
-lockwise-no-logins-card-content = Use passwords saved in { -brand-short-name } on any device.
# $count (Number) - Number of passwords exposed in data breaches.
[one] 1 password may have been exposed in a data breach.
*[other] { $count } passwords may have been exposed in a data breach.
